Title: HVAC Filter Upgrade
Description: Upgrade of HEPA filters in cleanroom suite B from H13 to H14 to meet new ISO guidelines.

Title: Cleanroom Air Handling Filter Change
Description: Replacing air handlers particulate filters with H14 grade in Suite C for better particle reduction.

Title: Centrifugal pump replacement
Description: Replace aging centrifugal pump P-102 on the WFI loop with a new sanitary stainless steel model.

Title: WFI Pump swap
Description: Swapping out the old water for injection circulation pump for an upgraded model to prevent cavitation.

Title: LIMS Version Update
Description: Upgrading LabWare LIMS from version 7 to version 8 to implement new data integrity features.

Title: Lab Information System Patch
Description: Applying security patch 8.1 to the laboratory information management system server.

Title: SOP-QA-045 Revision
Description: Updating the deviation management SOP to reduce review timelines and integrate electronic signatures.

Title: Procedure Update for Deviations
Description: Revising the standard operating procedure for handling non-conformances to reflect new e-sig software.

Title: Primary Packaging Foil Supplier Change
Description: Changing the supplier for the blister pack aluminum lidding foil due to supply chain shortages.

Title: New Aluminum Lidding Source
Description: Qualifying a secondary vendor for blister packaging foil to ensure continuous supply.

Title: RODI Membrane Replacement
Description: Replacing the reverse osmosis membranes in the pre-treatment water system due to declining flux.

Title: Autoclave Chamber Steam Valve Repair
Description: Repairing the proportional steam inlet valve on Autoclave 2 to fix temperature fluctuations.

Title: Sterilizer Valve Swap
Description: Swapping the steam feed valve on the floor sterilizer unit after it failed the last preventative maintenance.

Title: Empower 3 CDS Database Migration
Description: Migrating the Empower 3 Chromatography Data System database to a new cloud server.

Title: Chromatography Server Relocation
Description: Moving the CDS data storage backend to AWS for better redundancy and disaster recovery.

Title: Gowning Procedure Update
Description: Updating the cleanroom gowning procedure to include sterile goggles for Grade B areas.

Title: Cleanroom Attire Policy Change
Description: Modifying the dress code in aseptic processing areas to mandate the use of sterilized eye protection.

Title: Chiller Unit Overhaul
Description: Complete overhaul of the secondary cooling loop chiller to fix refrigerant leaks.

Title: TrackWise QMS User Access Review
Description: Automating the quarterly user access review process for the QMS via a new script.

Title: Cartoner Vision System Upgrade
Description: Installing a new Cognex camera on the cartoner to verify 2D Datamatrix codes.

Title: Serialization Camera Addition
Description: Adding an inspection camera to the packaging line to check the printed serial numbers on cartons.

Title: Master Batch Record Translation
Description: Translating the MBR for Product X from English to Spanish for the new contract manufacturing site.

Title: Lyophilizer Condenser Defrost Modification
Description: Modifying the PLC code on the freeze dryer to optimize the condenser defrost cycle time.

Title: Freeze Dryer Software Tweak
Description: Adjusting the control logic for the lyo defrost sequence to save energy and reduce cycle duration.

Title: EM Sampling Point Reduction
Description: Reducing the frequency of viable air sampling in non-classified corridors based on historical data.

Title: Decreasing EM Swab Locations
Description: Removing three surface monitoring locations from the CNC area due to 5 years of zero recoveries.

Title: Bioreactor Agitator Motor Replacement
Description: Replacing the failing mixing motor on the 500L bioreactor with a VFD compatible unit.

Title: ERP SAP S/4HANA Implementation
Description: Transitioning from legacy ERP to SAP S/4HANA for inventory and materials management.

Title: Extension of Expiry Date for Product Y
Description: Extending the shelf life of Product Y from 24 months to 36 months based on real-time stability data.

Title: TOC Analyzer Installation
Description: Installing an online Total Organic Carbon analyzer on the WFI return loop for real-time monitoring.
